allow: Bash(awk '/^class App \\{/{flag=1; next} flag && /^}$/{flag=0} flag' packages/client/src/main.ts)
Bash(awk '/^export class Board \\{/{flag=1; next} flag && /^}$/{flag=0} flag' packages/client/src/board.ts)
Bash(awk '/^export class Board \\{/{flag=1; next} flag && /^}$/{flag=0; print NR; exit}' packages/client/src/board.ts)
Bash(awk '/^export class Board \\{/{flag=1} flag && /^}$/{flag=0; next} !flag && /^\(export\\s+\)?function\\s/{print NR": "$0}' packages/client/src/board.ts)
